subject: [UUI] New Solve 2 components in one Docker
commit_message:
[UUI] New Solve 2 components in one Docker

1.add postgres env in uui-server
2.use oom common postgres

Signed-off-by: dujunyi <hunterdevil@foxmail.com>
Issue-ID: USECASEUI-405
Change-Id: Id72a11f5b8574ff566061fcdfe98663107b6de2f

Is this patch designed so that UUI server will use the postgres database?
If so, it is not working.
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//131444-3/k8s/k8s/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-uui-server-dff7dd44b-hxg72-uui-server-logs.html

Deploy and test locally and then push amend this patch.

i met a problem, i don`t know where is my pgpassword, and i now get 
`o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper   : FATAL: password authentication failed for user "uui" `
this connect error, my onap-postgres  is running, and i use pg name2 to connect , but how to get my generated password? 
I just set ${PG_USER} & ${PG_PASSWORD} in my init-container uui-server-update-config as follow in vnfsdk & DDMAP-DC ,but i found no same env in my uui-server container with command
`kubectl exec onap-uui-server-xxx -c uui-server -- env`
